name: ZOTAC GAMING GeForce RTX 4060 Ti 16GB Twin Edge Graphics Card
description: ZOTAC GAMING GeForce RTX 4060 Ti 16GB Twin Edge Graphics Card What is ZOTAC GAMING GeForce RTX 4060 Ti 16GB Twin Edge Graphics Card price in Pakistan? ZOTAC GAMING GeForce RTX 4060 Ti 16GB Twin Edge Graphics Card price in Pakistan is Rs.148,000. It features 4352 CUDA cores with boost clock up to 2535 MHz and 16GB GDDR6 memory on a 128-bit interface for strong 1080p and 1440p gaming performance. Built on PCIe 4.0 x8 with HDMI 2.1a and DisplayPort 1.4a outputs, it supports quad display and DLSS AI
